narrative:
Precinct Brush Creek (precinct in Muskingum County) has 773 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a clear Republican lean of 9.3 percentage points.
